The '''Dockside Cafe''' was a dining establishment in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was a small restaurant and bar that was frequented by spacers. There was no gambling, but there was a live band, and a [[Bartender droid/Legends|robo-bartender]] designated [[CG-X2R]].<ref name="GG7" /> [[Alfreda Goot]] baited [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] into the Cafe in an attempt to pick up the bounty on his head, but her mediocre training was no match for his luck, and she ended up dead.<ref name="SL">''[[Scoundrel's Luck]]''</ref>
